education.degree: ENVIRONMENT: ERP (SAP), UML, Oracle, PL/SQL, Visio2003, Visual Basic, MS Office Suite, SM-7, HP ALM, QTP, WindowsNT. IBM Sterling B2B Integrator, SharePoint 2013, Agile Project Manager and Scrum Master

projects: Build credibility, establish rapport, and maintain communication with stakeholders at multiple levels, including those external to the organization. Work with cross-functional business teams.

certifications: Extensively involved in communications with all stakeholders, managing the complete project end to end as an Agile Project Manager and Scrum Master.
